description: [vc_row triangle_shape=”no”][vc_column width=”1/4″][vc_single_image image=”7640″ img_size=”full”][vc_empty_space][vc_column_text css=””]Rhonda Sue Stern, EsqSenior Associate Attorney Email: info@chucksternmurphylawfirm.com Phone: 415-217-9456[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″][vc_column_text]Michael, Jr. is a ninth-year associate attorney and currently practices at the firm’s office in Fresno.  Similar to his father, Michael is an aggressive trial attorney that has also worked on both the plaintiff and defense side in all types of civil lawsuits. Michael spends most of his time serving his business clients, personal injury victims, handling employment cases as well as trust litigation. Michael has the ability to maneuver through complex cases after being exposed to some very big lawsuits early...
